提示：Base64 编码会使文件体积增大约 33%，建议仅对较小的 GIF 或需: Hint: Base64 encoding increases the file size by approximately 33%. It is recommended for use with smaller GIFs or scenarios where reducing the number of requests is necessary.
提示：WAV 格式将采用无损 PCM (S16LE) 编码，提供最高保真度。: Hint: WAV format uses lossless PCM (S16LE) encoding, providing the highest fidelity.
提示：WAV 格式通常存储为无损 PCM 音频，提供最高保真度，完美还原原始音质: Hint: WAV format is typically stored as lossless PCM audio, providing the highest fidelity and perfectly restoring the original sound quality.
提示：较高的比特率通常意味着更好的音质，但文件体积也会相应增大。: Hint: A higher bitrate usually means better sound quality, but it also increases the file size.
